headline: Why The Narrative Around PG&E (PCG) Is Shifting As Valuation And Risk Debates Intensify
summary: PG&E’s latest valuation work comes with a small trim to fair value, shifting to about US$22.72 from US$22.84, which may catch your eye if you are tracking price targets in the low US$20s. That tweak lines up with a research backdrop where some analysts are raising targets toward around US$23, while others are stepping back or turning more cautious, often citing wildfire and policy risk alongside questions about affordability. As you read on, you will see how these moves fit into the wider...

headline: NextEra Energy: Buying The Dominion Deal
summary: NextEra Energy announces a $66.8B all-stock merger with Dominion Energy, creating a 10M-customer utility and 110GW generation fleet. For more on NEE & D stocks.

headline: California Fire Spread Slows on Calm Winds After Evacuations
